# SeqOT: A Spatial–Temporal Transformer Network for Place Recognition Using Sequential LiDAR Data

- **Work ID:** `LPR-051`

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** NCLT, KITTI Odometry, MulRan, Haomo — `source_fact`; manual, p. 5–6, § Abstract;III. SeqOT;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **input_unit:** sequence of 20 LiDAR range images, each 32x900 in the main experiments — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–5, § Abstract;III. SeqOT;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **invariances:** yaw rotation, mathematically derived, permutation of temporally pooled subdescriptors, but not arbitrary reordering inside each three-scan window — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–5, § Abstract;III. SeqOT;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **representation:** sequence of spherical range images, single-scan OverlapNetLeg plus transformer, multi-scan transformer over consecutive three-scan windows, NetVLAD and MLP 256-D subdescriptors, GeM temporal pooling, two-phase triplet training — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–5, § Abstract;III. SeqOT;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–8, § Abstract;III. SeqOT;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **uses_sequence:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–8, § Abstract;III. SeqOT;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
